description_long: This sculpture is a classical-style marble bust depicting the head and upper neck of a young man with short, wavy hair and defined facial features. The face is solemn, with deep-set eyes, a straight nose, and a slightly pursed mouth, evoking a sense of stoic dignity. The hair is intricately carved, with individual locks and waves visible across the crown and sides. The back of the head and neck show significant damage, with large, irregular holes exposing the interior, suggesting age or deterioration. The surface is mostly smooth with subtle textural variations, especially in the hair and lower neck. The coloration is predominantly off-white with faint beige and grayish tones, typical of aged marble.
description: A damaged marble bust of a young man with detailed wavy hair and a solemn expression, featuring large holes in the back. The surface is smooth and off-white with subtle beige tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed facial features, including deep-set eyes, straight nose, and pursed lips.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the wavy hair and the strong jawline, with the ear and cheekbone visible.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing significant damage with large holes in the back of the head and neck, exposing the interior.
description_view_3: Right profile view displaying the hair texture and the side of the face, with the neck and lower jaw visible.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
